TobbieII.dance: Tobbie-II repeats the dance for a certain number of times
TobbieII.dance|param|times: the amount of times to dance; eg. 5
TobbieII.getIR: Read the value sensed by the selected infrared sensor.
TobbieII.isObstacle: Determine whether there is an obstacle on the selected side.
TobbieII.isObstacle|param|sensitivity: how easily the robot detects an obstacle
TobbieII.rotate: Start rotating to the right or to the left.
TobbieII.rotateTime: Start rotating to the right or to the left for a certain amount of time.
TobbieII.rotateTime|param|seconds: time in seconds Tobbie should rotate for
TobbieII.shake_head: Tobbie-II shakes his head a certain number of times.
TobbieII.shake_head|param|times: the amount of times to shake the head; eg. 5
TobbieII.stamp: Tobbie-II stamps his foot a certain number of times.
TobbieII.stamp|param|times: the amount of times to stamp; eg. 5
TobbieII.walkTime: Make Tobbie-II walk for a certain amount of time.
TobbieII.walkTime|param|seconds: time in seconds Tobbie should walk for
